vocab.example: We climbed for hours, but once we reached the summit, the sight we beheld was nothing short of miraculous.

vocab.meaning: không thốt nên lời (vì quá kinh ngạc)
vocab.example: When I first saw the Aurora Borealis dancing across the sky, I was completely lost for words.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng cực kỳ dễ chịu/đáng mừng khi nhìn thấy
vocab.example: After a grueling trek through the desert, the lush green oasis was a sight for sore eyes.

vocab.meaning: khắc sâu trong tâm trí (không thể quên)
vocab.example: The golden glow of the sun setting over the Santorini cliffs is permanently etched in my memory.
Looking out from the Eiffel Tower really helped expand my horizons and realize how vast the world is.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác cực kỳ sung sướng/tự tại (như đứng trên đỉnh thế giới)
vocab.example: Standing at the edge of the Grand Canyon, I felt like I was on top of the world, both literally and figuratively.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm/lâu dài
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the limestone karsts in Ha Long Bay left a lasting impression on me that I still talk about today.

vocab.meaning: niềm vui nhân đôi/phần thưởng thêm vào (làm cảnh đẹp thêm hoàn hảo)
vocab.example: The hotel room was great, but the panoramic view of the harbor was definitely the icing on the cake.

vocab.meaning: thu nhận/thưởng ngoạn trọn vẹn mọi thứ xung quanh
vocab.example: I sat on the balcony for an hour in silence, just trying to take it all in before we had to leave.

vocab.meaning: ở một nơi xa xôi hẻo lánh (nhấn mạnh vẻ đẹp hoang sơ)
vocab.example: We were in the middle of nowhere, but that meant the night sky was filled with an unbelievable number of stars.
